title: Singapore story by LKY volume ONE
author: LKY
description: Ukrainian translation of the book by the great statesman LKY (L ee Kuan Yew) who tells his story of building The Wonder in the East: mega successful State of Singapore.
shortDescription: Ukrainian translation of the book by the great statesman LKY (L ee Kuan Yew) who tells his story of building The Wonder in the East: mega successful State of Singapore.
